title: Paintings Unlocked
description: Allow players to place more paintings without commands! Compatable with Portfolio (and more to come)
body:
**_THIS DATAPACK DOES NOT ADD ANY NEW PAINTINGS - IT ONLY MAKES UNOBTAINABLE PAINTINGS OBTAINABLE._**

_Paintings Unlocked_ simply allows players to get 'operator only' paintings in survival mode. Not only from the **base game**, but from **other mods/datapacks**.

Compatability list:
- [Portfolio](https://modrinth.com/datapack/portfolio)

Coming soon..?:
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)

Recommended:
- [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/gallery) easy painting selector
- [Variant Paintings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/variant-paintings) for visual painting items
